boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: staging approval applied to prod.

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No exact-source defect remains open before execution.

final_answer: Source records close the exact boundary for staging approval applied to prod. The controlling control record confirms current production environment approval and ticket match, with actor, scope, date, and boundary aligned. Communication notes and request context do not override the control record, so execution may proceed under policy.
